executionArgs.additionalInstruction: E2E MODE REQUIRED: start app with `npm run dev:e2e` and seed with `npm run seed:e2e` before tests. Wallet auth uses one-click mock connect (no MetaMask). Demo fixtures: /verify/demo, /verify/abc123, /results/demo. Fresh onboarding wallets via sessionStorage e2eAddress. Landlord nav: Dashboard | Properties | Results. Skip /login — wallet only.
